title: Senior Marketing Data Analyst (f/m/x)
required_skills: 4+ years experience in marketing analytics, particularly mobile performance marketing
Strong SQL and Python for analysis
matched_skills: Marketing analytics mindset and KPI reporting
Campaign performance analysis and ROAS measurement (IPC role)
missing_skills: Mobile performance marketing (CPI, LTV, UA campaigns)
core_responsibilities: Partner with marketing teams to define KPIs and solve strategic challenges
Build and maintain automated dashboards for marketing decisions
Use SQL, Python, and statistical modeling for campaign and audience optimization
Analyse user acquisition, retention, and market trends
Ensure accuracy and integrity of marketing data across channels
recommended_emphasis: SQL and Python are hard requirements — significant gap in CV
Mobile gaming industry experience strongly preferred — not in CV
MMP (attribution) experience required — not in CV
Power BI and ROI analytics are positives but insufficient for this technical role
Score barely above 30 — consider discussing with user whether to proceed
